NOUAR Yacine
NOUAR Yacine
Grade:Maitre de conferences classe A
Grade:Maitre de conferences classe A
Email:nouar-y@univ-setif.dz
Email:nouar-y@univ-setif.dz
Département:Chimie
Bureau:28
Bureau:28

Dr. Yacine NOUAR
is an
Associate Professor
at the
Faculty of Sciences – Ferhat ABBAS University of Setif 1, where he joined as a Faculty
member since December, 2017.
Prior to that, he spent four years as
Assistant Professor at Faculty of Sciences - 20 August 1955
University of Skikda.
He's membership of the Physico-Chemistry of
High Polymer Laboratory since 2006. He was a membership of a research team on the recovery of polymers, Research Unit on Emerging Materials (URMES) - Ferhat ABBAS
University of
Setif 1. Moreover, h
e published several research
papers and scientific works in various international journals and conference
proceedings.
Elsewhere, he was membership of CNEPRU project (2016-2019); Project registered under number: A16N01UN190120150011. Currently,
he is a PRFU manager; Project registered under number: B00L01UN190120220003.
ACADEMIC QUALIFICATIONS
- State's Engineer in
Processes Engineering /
Polymer Engineering,
UFA - Setif (2004) ;
- Magister in
Processes Engineering /
Polymer Engineering,
UFA - Setif (2008) ;
- PhD. in
Processes Engineering /
Polymer Engineering,
UFA - Setif 1 (2018) ;
-
University Habilitation (Qualification to Supervise Research)
in
Processes Engineering
, UFA - Setif 1 (2021).
APPOINTMENTS
-
Research Associate
, Dep. of Processes Engineering (2008) ;
-
Assistant
, Dep. of Technology (2010) ;
-
Assistant Professor
, Dep. of Material Sciences (2013) ;
-
Assistant Professor
, in permanent position, Dep. of Material Sciences (2014) ;
-
Associate Professor
, in permanent position, Dep. of Chemistry (2019) ;
-
Senior Associate Professor
, in permanent position, Dep. of Chemistry (2021).
TEACHING ACTIVITIES
Undergraduate Courses (1st Cycle)
- General Chemistry (Students of Material Sciences) ;
- Thermodynamics (Students of Material Sciences) ;
- Physico-Chemical Analysis Techniques (Students of Chemistry) ;
- Phase Separation Methods and Chromatography (Students of Analytical Chemistry).
Postgraduate Courses (2nd Cycle)
- Analysis Methods (Students of Materials Chemistry) ;
- Thermal Analysis Methods (Students of Analytical Chemistry and Analysis).
Supervisor of Master Memories:
1) The chemical synthesis
of conducting polymers and theirs applications ;
2) Study of the performances
of conducting polymers and composites ;
3) The use of vegetable
fibers for reinforcing polymers ;
4) Recovery of plastics wastes / Recycling of polymers / Polymer blends ;
5) Medicinal plants and phytochemistry studies.
RESEARCH
INTERESTS/ACTIVITIES
- Ecological composite
materials ;
- Recovery of
plastics wastes, recycling of polymers and study of end life ;
- Phase Change Materials ;
- Medicinal plants and Phytochemistry Research.
BOOK
B. BARKA, F.
ROUABAH, F. ZOUAOUI, M. FOIS, Y. NOUAR*, A. BENCID
« Polymers, Ceramics
and Semiconductors :  Thermophysical Behavior of Polycarbonate;
Effect of Free Quenching Above and Below the Glass Transition Temperature »
.
In :
A. KIN TAK LAU, T. OMATSU and Z LI
«
Engineering Materials and their Properties »
, TRANS TECH PUBLICATIONS LTD,
Baech, Switzerland, (2022), pp. 126-139.
ISBN (softcover): 978-3-0364-0172-0
; ISBN ; (eBook): 978-3-0364-1172-9.
